h1: Drain Fly Treatment in NYC — Eliminate the Breeding Source
heroParagraph: Drain flies breed in the organic buildup inside floor drains, sink drains, and sewer connections — not just in the water itself. You can't eliminate them with bleach poured down the drain. Professional treatment uses specialized enzyme treatments and mechanical agitation to break down the biofilm where drain flies breed, combined with adult fly treatment to break the reproduction cycle.
